name: @gonext/bundle-budget
description: Bundle size budget checker for GoNext Next.js apps. Parses Next.js build output (.next/build-manifest.json + per-route assets), computes per-chunk gzipped sizes, and gates CI against budgets declared in a YAML file. See tools/bundle-budget/README.md and adr/* for the rationale. Issue #126.

scripts.build: echo '@gonext/bundle-budget: source-only package, no build step'
